docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY GUO, HONGQIONG AS TO DEFENDANT ZHEN, GUOWEI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-20-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF HONGQIONG GUO IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT GUOWEI ZHEN IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE FILED. NO APPEARANCES.
